title: CCL - UI
scenario: CCL settings UI in Device Settings > Advanced displays three radio button options (No Noise Block, AI Noise Block, UC Noise Block) with descriptions for microphone noise control.
steps: Read the description: 'Limit the amount of nearby conversation transmitted through your microphone. (Note: changes will take effect on the next call.)'

Observe the three radio button options: No Noise Block ('Optimized for voice isolation'), AI Noise Block ('Enhanced for hybrid work environments'), and UC Noise Block ('Best for open office environments').
expected: The CCL settings UI displays the description and three radio button options as described.
